message:
fix(core): handle escape sequences in TOML inline comment stripping

Fix strip_toml_inline_comment to track backslash escapes inside
double-quoted strings, preventing escaped quotes from prematurely
closing the quoted region and corrupting values containing sequences
like \". Also add tests for quoted token resolution (double-quoted,
single-quoted) and empty-explicit-token fallthrough behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
